modnotesiodetails: Tranche IO is a WAC IO.
othernotes: 1) For one pool, GNMA reported an incorrect factor causing FNMA to overpay the A bonds by approximately $650,000.   As a result, for pool 529698, the pool will be IO for 179 periods (173 from securitization) until FNMA is fully repaid its principal.  The model currently reflects this adjustment.  Beginning in Feb 04, FNMA began recognizing  the principal once more for Pool 529628.  This appears premature.  We are in the process of investigating the matter, but for now, Pool 529698 remains an IO loan.  This may change in the future which would shorten the average life on all classes.  Please take this into consideration when trading or analyzing the bond.  2) After tying out the deal in order to match the FNMA collateral data certain loan rates, payments and servicing fees were adjusted.
